reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 아주 조아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 오자마자 물어뜯고있습니당ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Love it so much haha 😂 She's been chewing on it since it arrived!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
튼튼하게 잘 만든 제품이에여 터그놀이도 가능하구여
여러모로 잘 산 제품같아요
reviews.content_en: It's a well-made, durable product! You can even play tug-of-war with it. Definitely a great purchase overall.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바스락소리에 삑삑이까지 있어서 넘좋아요
애기가 젤좋아하네요 장난감 생긴것도 귀여워서 저도갖고싶어요
reviews.content_en: I love the crinkly sound and the squeaker! 🐶 My pup absolutely loves it. The toy design is so cute I want one for myself too!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
삑삑이랑 터그놀이 둘다 좋아하는 강아진데
둘다 가능해서 좋아요 그리고 대형견인 강아지가 가지고 놀기에도 작지도 않고 너무 크지도 않고 딱 적당하고 가운데 체리꼭지거 뚫려있어서 손가락 넣어서 빠지지않게 잘 가지고 놀아줄수있어요!! 강아지와 제가 둘다 맘에 들어하는 장난감이에요 ~ 가지고 놀다가 해지면 다시 살거에용
reviews.content_en: My big dog loves both the squeaker and tug-of-war play, so it's perfect that this toy does both! The size is just right—not too small, not too big. And there's a hole in the middle with a cherry stem shape, so I can put my finger in and play with my pup without it slipping away!! It's a toy we both love~ When it eventually wears out, I'll definitely buy it again!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 2개째? 3개째 구매하는 제품이에용 강아지가 환장합니다 배송도 빨라서 굿굿
reviews.content_en: This is my 2nd or 3rd purchase of this product! My dog is obsessed with it. Plus the shipping is super fast, which is great!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
장수보호소 출신 시골 똥강아지 숭늉이예요!
첫 장난감은 모두 바잇미에서 구매했어요 💜 
바잇미 이름에 맞게, 막 이 나기 시작한 아기 강쥐에게 딱이더라구요!! 바잇미 체리터그, 토마토개찹은 숭늉이의 최애 장난감, 애착 장난감이 되었답니다 :)
reviews.content_en: I'm Sungneum, a country pup from a local shelter rescue! 💜 I bought my first toys all from BITE ME. True to the BITE ME name, it's perfect for my baby pup who's just starting to teethe!! The BITE ME Cherry Tug and Tomato Ketchup have become Sungneum's absolute favorite toys and comfort toys! :)

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 바잇미에서 첫구매했는데 원래 블랭킷만 구매하려다 장난감도 선물해줬는데 포장 뜯자마자 너무 좋아해서 하루종일 갖고놀더라구요! 체리 색상도 너무 사랑스럽고 삑삑 소리도 나고 애기가 물고와서 같이 놀자고 하기도 하고 혼자서도 물고 소리도 내며 잘 가지고놀아요 ㅎㅎ 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: I made my first purchase from BITE ME. I was originally just going to buy a blanket, but they gifted me a toy too, and my pup loved it so much she played with it all day long as soon as I opened the package! The cherry color is so adorable, it has a squeaker sound, and she brings it to me wanting to play together. She also plays with it on her own, squeaking away happily! hehe Thank you so much!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
초록색 꼭지(?) 빼고 길게 만들면
아이랑 터그 놀이 하기에 좋아서 그렇게 놀다가
다시 끼워서 체리모양을 만들려고 했는데
어떻게 끼울지 모르겠더라구요?
근데 그냥 살짝 힘 줘서 집어넣으면 되는거였습니다 ㅎ
저희 아이가 정말 좋아해요
장난감 살때마다 바잇미에서 사는데
항상 신박하고 귀여운 장난감들이 나와서 너무 좋아요
디자이너분들 진짜루 열일하시는거같아요... 쵝오
그만큼 제 통장은 텅장이 돼가지만 아이가 좋아하니 너무 뿌듯하네욤
reviews.content_en: If you made it longer by removing the green stem part (?), it would be great for playing tug-of-war with my pup. I tried putting it back on to make the cherry shape again, but I wasn't sure how to attach it at first. Turns out you just need to push it in with a little force! hehe My pup absolutely loves it. Every time I buy a toy, I get it from BITE ME, and they always come up with such innovative and cute designs. The designers really seem to be working hard... seriously the best 😍 Though my wallet is getting empty in the process, seeing how much my pup loves it makes me so proud!

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
체리가 최애 장난감이 되었어요🐶🍒
터그 놀이도 가능하고 던지기 놀이도 가능해서 좋고 넘 귀여워요ㅠㅠ 장난감 준 다음날 아침에 장난감 바스켓에서 꺼내와서 안깨우고 옆에서 혼자 조용히 놀고 있는데 그 모습이 어찌나 사랑스럽던지요😍
reviews.content_en: Cherry has become my pup's favorite toy! 🐶🍒 I love that you can play tug-of-war and fetch with it, and it's so adorable ㅠㅠ The day after I gave her the toy, she pulled it out of her toy basket the next morning and quietly played with it by herself without waking me up. That moment was just so precious! 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 윗부분이 터그놀이 할 수 있는거라서 가지고놀기 좋아요! 모양도 귀여워서 놀아주면서 덜 지루하고(인간이…ㅎ) 가벼워서 덜 무리가서 너무 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: The top part is great for tug-of-war play! The design is so cute that playing with my pup is less boring for me haha, and since it's lightweight, it's not too much strain on her. Love it!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
우리집 아가는 왜인지 모르게 빨간색을 너무 좋아해서 빨간색이길래 그냥 샀는데요, 역시나 너무나 좋아합니다! 
하지만 다른 보호자님들이 몇몇 리뷰에서 언급해주셨듯이 내구성이 좀 약한 것은 사실인 것 같아요ㅠㅠ 
몇일 가지고 놀았는데 체리 솜부분이 금새 터져버려서 바느질 해가지고 신나게 물어뜯으며 잘 갖고 놀고 있습니다! 
그래도 뭐 잘 갖고 노니까 그런데로 만족이요~!
reviews.content_en: Our little one loves red for some reason, so I just bought it because it was red, and sure enough, she absolutely loves it! However, as some other pet parents mentioned in their reviews, the durability is a bit weak 😭 After playing with it for a few days, the cherry stuffing tore pretty quickly, so I stitched it up and now she's happily chewing and playing with it! Still, she's having fun with it so I'm satisfied~!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 이제품은 오프라인에서 먼저 접했습니다! 5살 푸들인데요~ 첫템을 끈이 해질때까지 정말 잘갖고 놀더라고요!  체리공이랑 끈이 분리가 되더라도 공으로 잘갖고 놀아서요 ㅎㅎ 그래서 알아보다가 바잇미쇼핑몰에서 재구매 헸답니다~ 체리공은 삑삑소리나고 잎사귀는 바스락소리가나서 댕댕이의 감각을 자극해주네요! 좋아하는터그놀이도 실컷하고... 단점은 찾을 수 없네용...하나꼽자면댕댕이도 체리가 너무 예쁜지(?) 아끼느라 살살 조심히 갖고 노는 느낌이에요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I first encountered this product offline! I have a 5-year-old poodle~ and she played with the first one so well until the rope frayed! Even after the cherry ball and rope separated, she still played with the ball 😄 So I looked it up and repurchased it from the BITE ME shop~ The cherry ball squeaks and the leaves crinkle, so it really stimulates my pup's senses! She plays tug-of-war to her heart's content... I can't find any downsides~ If I had to pick one, it's that my pup finds the cherry so pretty(?) that she plays with it gently and carefully 😄

reviews.name: 혀****
reviews.content:
정말 가성비 좋고 젤 맘에 드는 기여운 장난감이에요!!
체리 알맹이(?) 한쪽에는 삑삑이도 있어요 🤭♥️
체리 꼭다리(?)엔 바스락 소리가 나구요~~~>_<
알맹이는 터그 하기에도 좋고 꼭다리는 요 사진에있는 우리 제리가 좋아하는 최애 장난감이에요!!
저랑 함께있는 두마리 모두 소형견이라 크기가 제격인가봐요 ㅎㅎ 
한마리는 겁쟁이라 삑삑이를 무서워 하지만
터그를 엄청 사랑한다규용~~~
reviews.content_en: It's seriously great value and the cutest toy I love!! The cherry itself(?) has a squeaker on one side 🤭♥️ And the cherry stem(?) makes a crinkling sound~~~>_< The ball is great for tug play and the stem is our Jerry's favorite toy as shown in this picture!! Since both of my dogs are small breeds, the size seems just right 😄 One of them is a scaredy-cat so she's afraid of the squeaker but the other absolutely loves tug-of-war~~~

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
리뷰 사진상 왼쪽에 있는게 제일 오래된 거구요 
오른쪽이 요번에 새로 산거. 
아직 안뜯은게 스페어입니다...ㅎㅎㅎ 
터그 다른거 거들떠도 안봐여 ㅜㅜ... 이거만 물고와여 
집에 있는 온갖 장난감이 다 바잇미껀데 
요거.... 솔직히 내구성이ㅜㅜ... 
근데 뭐 로프부분은 어쩔수없을거같긴해여 또르르 
첨 샀던거도 매듭이 빠지려고해서 
집에서 바느질해서 잘 고정시켜서 쓰다가 결국엔 한가닥 빠져서 
두가닥으로만 되어있는 상태고.. 완전 아작나기 전에 
두개 더 산건데 새로 깐거는 한시간도 안되서 로프부분 뽑히길래 ㅜㅜ 
또 급하게 덕지덕지 바느질로 꼬맸습니다아... 
아직 안뜯은건 애 입에 물리기 전에 미리 꼬매고 시작해야겠어요ㅜㅜㅋ... 
그 정도로 애가 환장합니다!
reviews.content_en: The one on the left in the review photo is the oldest one, and the right one is the new one I just bought. The unopened one is a spare...😄😄😄 She won't even look at other tug toys 😭😭... she only brings this one. All the toys at home are BITE ME products, but this one... honestly the durability is 😭😭... but well, the rope part is unavoidable I guess 🙃 The first one I bought had the knot coming undone so I stitched it at home to keep it secure, but eventually one strand came out so now it only has two strands... Before it completely fell apart, I bought two more, but the newly opened one had the rope part coming out in less than an hour 😭😭 So I had to hurriedly stitch it up again... I'll have to pre-stitch the unopened one before putting it in my pup's mouth 😭😭😂... To that extent, my pup is obsessed with it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아직 안줬는데 호기심을 갖네요
패키징이 너무 귀여워서 선물용으로도 좋겠어요
소형견에 적당한 사이즈고
얘도 정말 신나게 놀 것 같아서 벌써 기대되네요
reviews.content_en: Haven't given it yet but she's showing curiosity! The packaging is so cute it would be great as a gift too. It's a good size for small dogs and she seems like she'll play with it so enthusiastically that I'm already excited!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
두부가 장난감을 많이는 안갖고 놀지만 소품으로 사용하려구 겸사겸사 구매했어요.
근데 처음 받은 제품에 나뭇잎부분이 터져있어서 교환받았어요~ 빠르게 처리해주셔서 금방 받았네요😊
열씨미 갖고놀게 해줘야겠어요!
reviews.content_en: Tofu doesn't play with many toys but I bought this as a prop anyway. But the product I first received had a torn leaf part, so I exchanged it~ The customer service processed it quickly so I received it right away 😊 I should definitely get her to play with it!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨라요^^ 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요. 삑삑이 안에 내장되어 있는 장난감 좋아하는데~ 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping is fast^^ My puppy plays with it so well. She likes toys with a squeaker built inside~ and she loves this one 😄

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 최애 장난감 ㅎㅎㅎ다시 재구매 했습니당
reviews.content_en: It's her favorite toy 😄😄😄 I repurchased it!

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content:
좋아하며 잘 갖고 놀아요. 물고 놀아달라며 뛰어올 때 압도적으로 귀엽습니다. 
4kg정도의 강아지가 무리없이 잘 물고 뛸 수 있는 크기와 강도입니다. 저희집 강아지처럼 터그놀이를 주력으로 좋아하는 강아지라면 체리 잎사귀는 따로 빼두는 게 놀아주기 편할 것 같습니다.
reviews.content_en: She loves it and plays with it well. When she jumps up asking to play tug, it's overwhelmingly cute. For a 4kg dog, it's a size and durability she can play with and carry without any problems. If your dog is like mine and primarily loves tug-of-war, I'd recommend separating the cherry leaves to make it easier to play with her.

reviews.name: A****
reviews.content: 엄청 귀여워요 바잇미 장난감 가격대비 최고
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable, the best value for the BITE ME toy price!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지가 아주 좋아해요ㅎ 잎에서 바스락 소이 나고 줄기?부분이 물기 딱 좋은 느낌인가봐요ㅎ 열심히 물고 뜯어도 멀정해서 좋아요ㅎ 디자인도 너무 귀여워요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much! 😄 The leaves make a rustling sound and it seems like the stem part is just the right texture to bite on. Even when he chews and tears at it aggressively, it holds up really well, which is great! The design is also super cute! 😄😄

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 강아지가 터그 놀이를 너무 좋아해서 체리 터그 장난감이 너무 귀여워서 구매했는데 역시나 너무 잘 가지고 놀아용 🤍
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves tug games, so I bought this cute cherry tug toy and just as expected, he plays with it so well! 🤍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
지금 벌써 3번째? 구매중이에용👍🏻
저희 강아지 최애 터그인형입니당 너무 좋아용ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: This is already my 3rd purchase?! 👍🏻 It's my pup's favorite tug toy - he loves it so much! 😄😄😄

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 좋아요~ 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요. 장난감은 항상 여기서만 주문합니다^^ 삑삑이 최고 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great! My dog plays with it really well. I always order toys from here. ^ ^ The squeaker is the best 😄😄

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
체리알은 아직 커서 왕 못 물지만 이파리는 잘 물고
물고 흔들기도 하고 잘 가지고 놀아서 흐뭇합니다
마감도 좋고 어린강아지가 갖고 놀기에 무게도 부담스럽지 않습니다
reviews.content_en: The cherry part is still too big for my pup to bite, but he gnaws on the leaves nicely, shakes it around and plays with it well - I'm so happy! The finish is great and it's not too heavy for a young puppy to play with.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 이름도 넘 귀엽고 터그 놀이부터 바스락 놀이 삑삑이 놀이까지 가능한 장난감이라 넘 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: The name is so cute and it's an amazing toy because it works for tug games, rustling play, and squeaker play all in one! 😄😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 터그놀이 좋아하는데 귀여워요 색깔이 쨍하니 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves tug games and this is adorable! The colors are really vibrant and pretty.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 체리 삑삑이에 갈색 나무모양 끈이 신박하고 좋아요~~
reviews.content_en: The cherry squeaker with the brown stick-shaped string is such a cool and great design! 😄😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 넘모 ㄱㅣ여워요 애기가 가지고놀기 좋은 크기에요
reviews.content_en: It's SO cute! 😄 The size is perfect for the pup to play with.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 체리 이쁘고 귀엽고 좋아요!!터그도 되고 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The cherry is pretty and cute and great! 😄😄 Plus it works as a tug toy too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
터그도 되고 바스락도되고 좋아요
예쁜장난감이에요
reviews.content_en: Great because it can be used as a tug toy and also makes crinkly sounds! Such a cute toy.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 잘가지고 놀아서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Love it because my pup plays with it so much!

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content: 완죤 귀여운 체리네요~ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The cherry is absolutely adorable~ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
제가 좋아하는 장난감입니다. 보기에도 예쁘고 실용적이죠!!
하지만 애기가 하루만 갖고 놀고 잘 안 놀아서 너무 슬퍼요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ 가끔 안보일때 찾는 장난감인데 그때라도 놀아서 다행입니다
reviews.content_en: It's a toy I really love. It looks beautiful and is practical too!! But it's so sad because my baby only played with it for a day and hasn't been interested since ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ It's a toy she looks for sometimes when I'm not paying attention, so I'm glad she at least plays with it then.

reviews.name: z****
reviews.content: 선물 받았었는데 저희 애들이 너무 좋아해서 하나 더 주문했어요. 진짜 잘 가지고 놀구요 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 예쁘구요, 한가지 흠이라면 금방 망가지네요 그래서 별하나 뺐어요
reviews.content_en: My kids received this as a gift and loved it so much, I ordered another one. They really do play with it all the time, and the design is so cute and adorable. The only downside is that it breaks pretty quickly, so I'm taking off one star.

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 저희강아지 최애 입니디... 벌써 4번째 산거같아요 이거만 아침저녁으로 물고뜯고 그냥 주기적으로 갈아주는 중이에요ㅠㅠ💖
reviews.content_en: This is my dog's absolute favorite toy... I think I've bought it like 4 times already lol He just chews on it morning and night, so I have to replace it regularly ㅠㅠ💖

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요! 폭신인형 실타래 바스락거리는 부분 까지 세가지 매력이 있어용
reviews.content_en: So cute! It has three different appeals - the soft plush, the yarn texture, and the crinkly parts!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애기가 너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅎㅎ 대신 이갈이 시기라 그런지 하루만에 갈색 줄기 부분을 다 뜯어놨네요 흑ㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그래두 체리 장난감 너무 귀여워요 🍒
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much and plays with it constantly ㅎㅎ But since she's teething, she completely shredded the brown stem part in just one day ㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Still, the cherry toy is so adorable though 🍒

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
정말 너무너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ
사준지 하루만에 체리부분은 물어뜯어서 
꼬매줬지만 ㅠㅠ 바잇미 장난감은 사줄때마다
최애템으로 바뀌는거 같아요 !!
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it so much ㅋㅋㅋ He chewed up the cherry part within a day of me giving it to him so I had to sew it back up ㅠㅠ But every time I give him a BITE ME toy, it becomes his new favorite item!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
장난감 엄청 많은데 최애 등극했어요 
하루종일 물고다니고 미친듯이 물어 뜯었어요 
그래서 꼬매줬는데 또 뜯어짐 ㅜ 
너무 귀여운 장난감 만들어주셔서 감사해요
reviews.content_en: I have tons of toys, but this one became his #1 favorite! He carries it around all day and chews on it like crazy. I had to sew it back together but it got torn again ㅜ Thank you so much for making such an adorable toy!

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
🍒 체리가 너무 귀여워서 우리 아이까지 더 귀여워보여요^^
아직 터그놀이는 안하지만 잘물고 다니고 즐거워해요^^
잘쓰겠습니다 ♡
reviews.content_en: 🍒 Cherry is so cute that even our pup looks cuter now ^^ He hasn't done tug play yet but he's really into chewing on it and having fun ^^ We'll definitely be using this a lot ♡

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 이갈이 시기라 치약 터그 장난감이랑 같이 주문했어요 역시나 취향저격인가봐요 다른 장난감도 많은데 당분간은 계속 체리랑 치약만 가지고 놀꺼같아요ㅋㅋ장난감 많이 만들어주세요
reviews.content_en: He's in his teething phase so I ordered this along with a toothpaste tug toy. Looks like it hit the mark! We have tons of other toys but I think he's gonna be playing with Cherry and the toothpaste for a while lol. Please make more toys!

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content:
삑삑이인형을 워낙 좋아해서 이미 터지고 뜯어진것만 여럿🤭
귀여운🍒삑삑이 엄청 탄탄한거 같아서 이번은 오래오래 재밌개 잘 가지고놀길🐾
reviews.content_en: He loves squeaky toys so much that I already have multiple ones that are torn up and destroyed 🤭 This cute 🍒 squeaky one seems really durable so hopefully this time he'll enjoy playing with it for a long time 🐾

reviews.name: i****
reviews.content: 예쁘고 튼튼한 것 같았는데 저희 댕댕이 이빨이 더 튼틐한가봐요 ^^;;; 그래도 댕댕이가 넘 좋아해서 재구매의사 있습니다 ㅜ.ㅜ
reviews.content_en: It looked pretty and sturdy, but I guess our pup's teeth are even sturdier lol ;;; That said, he absolutely loves it so I'm planning to repurchase it ㅜ.ㅜ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워서 벼르고 있다 구매한 체리 장난감ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 일단 생긴것도 귀엽고 생각보다 튼튼해요! 아이는 아직까지 나뭇잎을 더 좋아하긴 하지만 더 크면 체리에 관심 가지겠죠ㅋㅋㅋ 터그놀이 할 수 있어서 좋은 제품!
reviews.content_en: I was eyeing this Cherry toy for a while and finally bought it lol It's cute looking and way sturdier than I expected! My pup still prefers the leaf more, but as he grows he'll probably get more interested in the cherry lol It's a great product because you can do tug play with it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: ㅋㅋㅋ 오자마자 무아지경~~~ 체리줄기 꼭다리를 자꾸 물어오 ㅜ 며칠 안에 끊어질 것 같아요,,,
reviews.content_en: lol He went crazy the moment we got it~~~ He keeps trying to bite the stem and tail of the cherry ㅜ I think it'll snap in a few days...

reviews.name: 콩****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워용 그래서...
첨엔 강쥐줄려고 샀지만 이뿌다보니 제가 탐이나더라구용
이건 내껍니다ㅋ
reviews.content_en: So cute! So... I bought it to give to my pup at first but since it's so pretty I got attached lol This one's mine k

reviews.content: 엄청 약해요 10분 갖고 놀고 사망
reviews.content_en: Super fragile. Played with it for 10 minutes and it's dead

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 개인적으로 정말 마음에 드는 장난감이에요. 터그 놀이도 할 수 있고 삑삑이랑 바스락거리는 파츠 둘 다 있어서 아이가 놀 때 더 재밌어해요^^
reviews.content_en: Personally I really love this toy. You can do tug play with it and since it has both a squeaker and crinkly parts my pup has even more fun playing ^^

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
양말 장난감, 애착인형 장난감,체리 장난감 이렇게 구매했는데 체리만 가지고 놀아요...ㅎ 
후기에 내구성이 약하다는 리뷰들을 봐서 사기까지 고민을 많이 했는데 고민 괜히 했다는 생각이 드네요!
잎사귀가 제거가능하여 길게 터그놀이가 가능한 점이 구매이유에 있어서 컸어요~
망가지면 다시 사야하는 장난감이 되버렸어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought a sock toy, an attachment toy, and this Cherry toy, but he only plays with the Cherry... ㅎ I read reviews saying it wasn't very durable so I was really hesitant about buying it, but I'm thinking that worry was for nothing! The removable leaves are great because you can do extended tug play, which was a big reason I bought it~ Now it's become one of those toys you have to keep rebuy lol
